review.notes: Initial public candidate pack. Every source and query group remains disabled until the editorial review gate is completed.

sources.name: Anthropic News
sources.rationale: First-party model, product, safety, and research announcements.

review.notes: Verify page structure, rights, and collection cadence before enabling.

sources.name: Google AI Blog
sources.rationale: First-party Google AI product and company announcements.

review.notes: Verify topic-page precision and publication timestamps.

sources.name: Google DeepMind Blog
sources.rationale: First-party frontier model, science, research, and safety updates.

review.notes: Confirm article-list extraction and long-form relevance thresholds.

sources.name: Microsoft AI Blog
sources.rationale: First-party enterprise AI, product, partnership, and adoption announcements.

review.notes: Confirm company-news noise limits and canonical article URLs.

sources.name: AWS Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud AI service releases and production engineering guidance.

review.notes: Review promotional density and product-release signal quality.

sources.name: Google Cloud AI and ML Blog
sources.rationale: First-party Vertex AI, cloud model, agent, and enterprise AI updates.

review.notes: Confirm pagination and article publication metadata.

sources.name: Microsoft Research Blog
sources.rationale: First-party research results with stronger explanatory context than release notes.

review.notes: Confirm scope remains AI-relevant and not general research noise.

sources.name: Hugging Face Blog
sources.rationale: Core first-party source for open models, datasets, libraries, and community tooling.

review.notes: Confirm authored and community posts are distinguishable.

sources.name: NVIDIA Developer Blog
sources.rationale: First-party GPU, inference, training, and AI infrastructure engineering updates.

review.notes: Confirm AI-category filtering and duplicate campaign handling.

sources.name: Apple Newsroom
sources.rationale: First-party Apple Intelligence, device, and operating-system announcements.

review.notes: Require AI-specific filtering because the page covers all Apple news.

sources.name: Qualcomm OnQ
sources.rationale: First-party edge AI, chip, mobile, and device ecosystem updates.

review.notes: Confirm AI topic filtering and publication date extraction.

sources.name: Adobe Artificial Intelligence Blog
sources.rationale: First-party generative media, Firefly, and creative workflow announcements.

review.notes: Check category consistency and marketing-copy density.

sources.name: GitHub Changelog
sources.rationale: First-party Copilot, platform, and developer-tool changes with strong timeliness.

review.notes: Apply Copilot and AI filters to avoid unrelated platform changes.

sources.name: Meta Engineering
sources.rationale: First-party large-scale AI systems, infrastructure, and engineering articles.

review.notes: Require AI-category filtering and canonical author metadata.

sources.name: ByteDance Newsroom
sources.rationale: First-party company and product announcements relevant to the China AI ecosystem.

review.notes: Verify AI relevance and avoid general corporate updates.

sources.name: Alibaba Group News
sources.rationale: First-party company, model, cloud, and business AI announcements.

review.notes: Require AI-specific filtering and cross-check technical claims.

sources.name: Zhipu AI News
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese source for GLM model and product announcements.

review.notes: Verify stable article URLs, dates, and public access behavior.

sources.name: Mistral AI News
sources.rationale: First-party model, API, partnership, and open-weight release announcements.

review.notes: Confirm release-category extraction and article dates.

sources.name: Cohere Blog
sources.rationale: First-party enterprise models, retrieval, deployment, and research updates.

review.notes: Review product marketing versus technical evidence balance.

sources.name: Databricks Engineering Blog
sources.rationale: First-party data and AI platform engineering, training, and production systems.

review.notes: Apply AI relevance filtering within the engineering category.

sources.name: Snowflake Engineering Blog
sources.rationale: First-party data cloud, ML platform, and AI infrastructure engineering updates.

review.notes: Apply AI relevance filtering and deduplicate product campaigns.

sources.name: Red Hat AI Blog Channel
sources.rationale: First-party open-source, hybrid cloud, and enterprise AI engineering content.

review.notes: Check article dates and channel-page extraction stability.

sources.name: Alibaba Cloud AI and Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud AI services and engineering practices from Alibaba Cloud.

review.notes: Review technical depth and duplicate campaign handling.

sources.name: Moonshot AI Platform Docs
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese API documentation suitable for tracking capability changes.

review.notes: Determine whether a stable changelog page is preferable to the docs index.

sources.name: MiniMax News
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese model, product, and company announcements.

review.notes: Verify stable article URLs, dates, and collection accessibility.

sources.name: ModelScope Headlines
sources.rationale: First-party Chinese open-model, dataset, tool, and community ecosystem updates.

review.notes: Differentiate official platform news from community reposts.

sources.name: CNCF Blog
sources.rationale: First-party cloud-native ecosystem source for AI infrastructure projects and releases.

review.notes: Apply AI-workload and project-release topic filters.

sources.name: Kubernetes Blog
sources.rationale: First-party orchestration source for AI workload, scheduling, and platform changes.

review.notes: Require AI-workload relevance filtering.

sources.name: CMU Machine Learning Blog
sources.rationale: Research explanations from an academic machine learning community.

review.notes: Confirm publishing activity and source attribution standards.

sources.name: MIT Technology Review AI
sources.rationale: Independent analysis of AI technology, industry, policy, and social impact.

review.notes: Treat as analysis and require first-party evidence for factual release claims.

queryGroups.label: Frontier model releases
queryGroups.rationale: Find first-party launches, capability updates, and model deprecations across major labs.
queries: new frontier AI model release official
large language model capability update official

review.notes: Approve query wording and provider cost before enabling.

queryGroups.label: Agent platforms and protocols
queryGroups.rationale: Track agent runtimes, tool protocols, orchestration frameworks, and production agent features.

review.notes: Review overlap with developer-tools and model-release groups.

queryGroups.label: Open-source AI ecosystem
queryGroups.rationale: Find open-weight models, datasets, inference stacks, and important repository releases.

review.notes: Confirm domain restriction does not hide project-owned release pages.

queryGroups.label: AI infrastructure and inference
queryGroups.rationale: Track chips, inference runtimes, serving systems, training infrastructure, and cloud-native changes.
queries: GPU AI software platform update official

review.notes: Review hardware-news noise and require technical primary evidence.

queryGroups.label: Enterprise AI platforms
queryGroups.rationale: Find meaningful enterprise platform, retrieval, security, and deployment changes.

review.notes: Tune against marketing-heavy results before approval.

queryGroups.label: AI research breakthroughs
queryGroups.rationale: Surface consequential research results while avoiding daily-paper volume overload.
queries: machine learning research result official blog

review.notes: Define significance threshold and paper-to-primary-source policy.

queryGroups.label: AI developer tools
queryGroups.rationale: Track coding assistants, SDKs, evaluation tools, and developer workflow changes.

review.notes: Review GitHub-only restriction and product-launch duplication.

queryGroups.label: China AI releases
queryGroups.rationale: Improve timeliness and coverage for Chinese model, platform, agent, and open-source releases.
queries: 国产大模型 官方 发布
AI 智能体 平台 官方 更新
开源模型 官方 发布 中国

review.notes: Approve Chinese query vocabulary and excluded-domain policy.

queryGroups.label: AI policy and safety
queryGroups.rationale: Track material safety research, regulatory changes, evaluations, and deployment governance.

review.notes: Define jurisdiction scope and primary legal-source preference.

queryGroups.label: Multimodal and edge AI
queryGroups.rationale: Track image, audio, video, robotics, device, and on-device model advances.
queries: AI video audio generation model release

review.notes: Review overlap with frontier models and product announcements.
